# Pull Request

## Description

<!-- Provide a brief description of your changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style/refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update

## Motivation and Context

<!-- Why is this change required? What problem does it solve? -->
<!-- If it fixes an open issue, please link to the issue here -->

Fixes #(issue)

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Please describe how you tested your changes -->

- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] Added new tests for new functionality
- [ ] Manually tested the changes
- [ ] Ran benchmarks (if performance-related)

## Screenshots (if appropriate)

<!-- Add screenshots to help explain your changes -->

## Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] No `console.log` statements left in production code

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested backward compatibility
- [ ] I have run the benchmark suite

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the README.md (if needed)
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md with my changes
- [ ] I have updated TypeScript definitions (index.d.ts) if needed
- [ ] I have added JSDoc comments to new methods
- [ ] I have added/updated examples if needed

### Dependencies

- [ ] ✅ I have NOT added any new dependencies (zero-dependency policy)
- [ ] I have verified that existing dependencies are not needed

### Security

- [ ] I have checked for security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have not introduced prototype pollution risks
- [ ] I have validated all user inputs
- [ ] I have not used `eval()` or similar dangerous functions

### Performance

- [ ] I have considered the performance impact of my changes
- [ ] I have run benchmarks if performance-related
- [ ] I have used appropriate data structures (Map, Set, etc.)
- [ ] I have avoided unnecessary loops or operations

## Additional Notes

<!-- Add any additional notes or context about the PR here -->

**By submitting this PR, I confirm that:**

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] I have read the [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) for AI assistance
- [ ] My contribution follows the project's design philosophy
- [ ] I understand this is a zero-dependency project
- [ ] I am ready for code review

Thank you for contributing to node-tfidf! 🚀
